user.title: ZHA Advanced Toolkit
user.description: Set up a companion integration for ZHA that exposes friendly entities for supported advanced Zigbee device settings. This does not replace ZHA or pair devices.

abort.already_configured: ZHA Advanced Toolkit is already configured.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one ZHA Advanced Toolkit entry is needed.

create_entry.default: ZHA Advanced Toolkit has been set up. Supported ZHA devices will appear as entities under their existing ZHA devices.

diagnose.name: Diagnose
diagnose.description: Show which ZHA devices ZHA Advanced Toolkit can currently see.
